ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Current position or job title of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started working */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID where the employee belongs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed job description */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* Reports to (Manager ID) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_reports_to FOREIGN KEY ("reports_to") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who is a manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started as a manager */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee ended being a manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given to the employee during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with the user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the HRMS */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, manager, employee) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "failed_logins" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being paid */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "gross_pay" REAL /* Gross pay for the employee */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes deducted from the employee's pay */,
  "benefits" REAL /* Benefits provided to the employee */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting leave */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date of the leave request */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick, maternity) */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, denied, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
